summary: Completed comprehensive testing of File Manager feature. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. File upload, list, download, delete, category filtering, and search all working correctly.
test_credentials: No authentication required - app is open access
seed_data_creation: Existing test_upload.txt file in 'draft' category was preserved
context_for_next_testing_agent: File Manager feature fully tested and working. Backend tests cover: file list, category filtering, file upload (txt, csv), default category, invalid extension rejection (.exe, .php), oversized file rejection (>10MB), file download, file delete, full CRUD flow, metadata update. Frontend tests cover: page load, upload button, drop zone, search input, category filters, file list, upload form with category/notes, file upload flow, search filtering, category filtering, delete functionality. All data-testid attributes present and working.

file_upload.details: POST /api/files/upload accepts multipart form data with file, category, notes. Correctly validates file extension and size. Returns file metadata with id, filename, original_name, size, content_type, category, notes, uploaded_at.

file_list.details: GET /api/files returns list of all files. GET /api/files?category=X filters by category. Category 'semua' returns all files.

file_download.details: GET /api/files/{id}/download returns file content with correct Content-Disposition header. Returns 404 for nonexistent files.

file_delete.details: DELETE /api/files/{id} removes file from disk and database. Returns 404 for nonexistent files.

file_validation.details: Upload rejects invalid extensions (.exe, .php) with 400 error. Upload rejects files over 10MB with 400 error.

file_metadata_update.details: PUT /api/files/{id} updates category and notes fields.

frontend_ui.details: File Manager page loads correctly with upload button, drop zone, search, category filters, file list. Upload form shows file name, category select, notes input. Download/delete buttons visible on hover. Search and category filtering work correctly.

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/files/upload - Upload file with category and notes
